name: @scale/design-system
description: Scale Design System — A Lit-based agentic design system with machine-readable context for AI and human developers

components.description: Vertically stacked sections that expand and collapse with progressive disclosure pattern
components.whenToUse: FAQ sections, settings panels, content that should be hidden by default but accessible on demand

components.description: Bordered alert card with status icon, heading, body text, and up to two action buttons
components.whenToUse: Persistent inline alerts inside a panel or card — info/warning/negative/positive states with optional actions

components.description: Grouped overlapping avatars with overflow count indicator
components.whenToUse: Team rosters, shared document viewers, multi-user presence indicators, collaborator lists

components.description: User avatar with image, initials, or icon fallback across 5 sizes
components.whenToUse: User profile pictures, comment sections, user lists, team members, any place a user representation is needed

components.description: Status indicators displayed inline with content or on top of another element
components.whenToUse: Status labels, category tags, notification counts, feature flags

components.description: Full-width inline banner with status icon, text, optional link, and dismiss control
components.whenToUse: Full-width page-level announcements, system status, marketing banners, dismissable notices

components.description: Inline breadcrumb trail with chevron separators showing navigation hierarchy
components.whenToUse: Navigation trails on deep pages, app hierarchy indication, location context

components.description: Icon-only button without a label, used for secondary actions like search, theme toggle, close
components.whenToUse: Toolbar actions, icon buttons where the icon is self-explanatory, space-constrained UIs

components.description: Button with fully rounded ends (pill shape), used for CTAs and navigation
components.whenToUse: Hero CTAs, pill-shaped navigation, floating action buttons, tag-like actions

components.description: Primary action element with 13 visual variants, 3 sizes, loading and disabled states
components.whenToUse: Primary user actions, form submissions, navigation triggers, any interactive CTA

components.description: Card surface with image area and content slots, supports default and fill layouts
components.whenToUse: Feature cards, blog post previews, product showcases, any content with image + text

components.description: Pricing plan card with header, feature rows, and action area
components.whenToUse: Pricing pages, plan comparison, subscription tiers

components.description: Standalone checkbox visual primitive (square + tick) without a label or form binding
components.whenToUse: Custom layouts that need the checkbox visual without label or form-association (e.g. cards, list items)

components.description: Checkbox form control with label and form-association — emits change events
components.whenToUse: Form fields for multi-select options, terms acceptance, settings toggles that need a label and form binding

components.description: Thin horizontal line separating content sections
components.whenToUse: Section separators, list item dividers, visual grouping boundaries

components.description: Site footer with brand logo, copyright text, and licence link
components.whenToUse: Page footers, bottom of marketing sites, legal pages

components.description: Fixed top navigation bar with logo, nav links, theme toggle, and CTA buttons
components.whenToUse: Site-wide navigation, marketing site headers, app top bars

components.description: Small descriptive text near form fields with optional status icons
components.whenToUse: Form field hints, validation messages, input guidance, error/success feedback

components.description: Full-width hero section with background image, heading, subtitle, CTAs, and optional email form
components.whenToUse: Landing page top section, product introductions, conversion-focused entry points

components.description: Single-line text input field with label, icons, help text, and validation states
components.whenToUse: Form fields, search inputs, email capture, any single-line text entry

components.description: Scale brand logo with mark and wordmark, supports sizes and inverse style
components.whenToUse: Headers, footers, brand references, any place the Scale logo is needed

components.description: Elevated dropdown surface that hosts sc-menu-item children
components.whenToUse: Floating menu surface for header nav menus, user menus, action menus — wraps sc-menu-item children

components.description: Menu row with leading/trailing icons, label, link or button behaviour, and selection states
components.whenToUse: Individual menu rows inside sc-menu-dropdown or standalone lists — supports row/button/link types

components.description: Standalone radio visual primitive (circle + dot) without a label or form binding
components.whenToUse: Custom layouts that need the radio visual without label or form-association (e.g. cards, list items)

components.description: Radio form control with label and form-association — emits change events
components.whenToUse: Form fields for single-select choices that need a label and form binding

components.description: Horizontal list item with optional leading/trailing icons and a divider
components.whenToUse: Pricing feature lists, settings rows, menu items, any horizontal label-value pair

components.description: Bento grid section with 4 card slots in a Z-pattern layout
components.whenToUse: Feature showcases, product highlights, portfolio displays, visual grid layouts

components.description: Simple content section with heading and subtext, centered or left-aligned
components.whenToUse: Text-only sections, section headers, standalone content blocks

components.description: FAQ section with heading on the left and accordion items on the right
components.whenToUse: FAQ pages, help sections, common questions about a product or feature

components.description: Feature section with text column and image column, supports reverse layout
components.whenToUse: Feature highlights, product walkthroughs, alternating text-image sections

components.description: Pricing section with heading and 3 pricing cards in a responsive grid
components.whenToUse: Pricing pages, plan comparison sections, subscription tiers

components.description: Card-based signup section with heading, subtext, input, and action button
components.whenToUse: Email capture sections, newsletter signup, call-to-action blocks

components.description: Status indicator icon with info, warning, error, and success variants in 3 sizes
components.whenToUse: Validation feedback, status indicators, alert icons, help text icons

components.description: On/off switch toggle for settings and preferences
components.whenToUse: Settings toggles, feature flags, preference switches, enable/disable controls
